info.title: Doormat
info.description: AI-first rental finder - autonomous property manager discovery and listing scoring

get.description: Return whether system-wide keys are configured in .env.
Return paginated cost records from the database.

schema.title: Response List Costs Api Costs Get

get.description: Return aggregate cost summary with budget status.
Return costs grouped by component (discovery, extraction, scoring).

schema.title: Response Costs By Component Api Costs By Component Get

get.description: Return costs grouped by LLM model.

schema.title: Response Costs By Model Api Costs By Model Get
Response Costs By City Api Costs By City Get

get.description: Return daily cost aggregates for the last N days.

schema.title: Response Costs Timeseries Api Costs Timeseries Get

post.description:
Trigger a discovery run asynchronously.

Creates a run record, kicks off discovery as a background task, and returns
immediately. The frontend should poll GET /runs/{run_id} to track progress.

get.description: List recent discovery runs, newest first.

schema.title: Response List Runs Api Discovery Runs Get

get.description: Get a single discovery run with all log lines.

schema.title: Response List Managers Api Discovery Cities  City  Managers Get

post.description:
Fetch HTML from validated property managers and run listing extraction.

For each validated PM in the city (up to max_managers), fetches their
website HTML and runs Mode A extraction. Scores persisted results against
the given preference when preference_id is provided.

schema.title: Response Get Listings Api Listings Get

get.description: SSE stream — push new listings as they arrive.

post.description: Score persisted listings against a saved preference.

get.description: Return a single listing by ID.

post.description: Resolve lat/lon via Nominatim (cached) and persist on the listing.
Toggle the saved state of a listing.

get.description: Return saved search preferences, newest first.

schema.title: Response List Preferences Api Preferences Get

get.description: Return default vs effective LLM prompts for this preference.

patch.description: Update or reset per-key LLM prompt overrides (defaults remain in code).

post.description: Create a parent `SearchRun` and start wrapped discovery in the background.

schema.title: Response List Search Run Events Api Search Runs  Run Id  Events Get
Response List Search Run Results Api Search Runs  Run Id  Results Get

post.description:
Fetch OpenRouter models using the provided API key.

When curated=true (default): returns the hand-picked paid model list plus
ALL free models (`:free` suffix). When curated=false: returns everything.

schema.title: Response List Models Api Openrouter Models Post

SearchRunFiltersPatch.description: Mutable filters for the current run; disallows next-run-only scope changes.
